summary.intent: Implement GridList adapter components for Leptos and Dioxus (tasks #398 and #490), including full test coverage, E2E fixtures, widget examples, and documentation improvements to enforce reference-parity and agnostic-first development practices.
summary.outcome: GridList adapters were implemented with core-owned behavior, E2E fixtures with browser-verified DnD (drag image, drop placement, grid live preview, persisted reorder), showcase examples across all six widget variants, and adapter workflow docs were restructured into a split file set and published as a separate docs-only PR (#721) with review fixes applied.

repo: The repo uses `cargo xtask e2e <category> --adapter leptos|dioxus` for focused E2E runs; no `--component`, `--visual-only`, or `--behavior-only` flags exist as of this commit

E2E fixture categories must use directory-backed module structure: `categories/<category>/mod.rs` + `categories/<category>/<component>.rs`; flat category files should be migrated as each component is added
Adapter test files must be named `test_<component>.rs` and `test_<component>_wasm.rs` (not `<component>.rs`) for `cargo xtask lint adapter-parity` to discover them
Dioxus `EventHandler` is not `Send + Sync` and cannot be captured inside agnostic `Callback<T>` props; DnD and selection callbacks must be bridged adapter-locally
Leptos `web_sys` browser APIs (e.g., `DataTransfer`, `MouseEvent` offset methods) require explicit `web-sys` feature flags in `Cargo.toml`; they are not enabled by default

The agnostic GridList core owns render blocks, item render state, drag key resolution, drop target, preview ordering, and reorder payload construction; adapters must consume `api.render_blocks()` and `ItemRenderState` rather than recomputing those in adapter/demo code
React Aria / React Spectrum is the primary reference for component parity; counterpart review must happen in-browser before planning begins
The `spec/AGENTS.md` has a `cargo xtask spec validate` command to enforce spec conformance; part list changes require updating both spec anatomy tables and conformance test expected lists
Snapshot tests use `INSTA_UPDATE=always cargo test ...` to refresh; stale `.snap.new` files must be reviewed and committed
Widget examples across the three styling variants (plain/css/tailwind) must expose identical scenarios; copy from tailwind source and adjust only presentation classes

code.finding: Core API exposes `render_blocks()`, `ItemRenderState`, `drag_keys()`, `drop_target()`, and `reorder_payload()` helpers; adapters must consume these instead of recomputing them independently
Leptos adapter render memo must subscribe to `api.drag_keys()` and `api.drop_target()` as invalidation inputs, otherwise DnD state changes do not trigger cell re-renders for list/stack layout
Dioxus drop handlers must read `api.drop_target().cloned()` before computing event-cell fallback; otherwise the drop lands on the moved preview card after grid reflow and resolves back to a no-op
Synthetic drag helpers must split dragstart and dragover into separate `execute_script` calls so Dioxus/Leptos can apply signal-driven rerenders before dragover resolves a fresh target element

Adapter-level component work now requires reading `docs/implementation/adapter-component-delivery.md` and all linked split workflow docs before planning; checklists are not substitutes for the full doc
Explicit rule: renderer-independent behavior belongs in `crates/ars-components`; duplicating selection, DnD, load-more, or parity rules in Leptos/Dioxus or demo code is a workflow violation
DnD demos must pass `dnd_enabled=true` to `GridList` and grid examples must also pass `layout=GridListLayout::Grid`; without these the machine rejects DragStart and items snap back on drop

workflow: For agnostic-first components, add failing core tests before touching adapters; this catches API surface issues before compiling across six example crates
Use `cargo check --manifest-path <path>/Cargo.toml` for out-of-workspace fixture/example crates instead of `-p`
The in-app browser automation cannot emit native HTML DragEvents; use the browser-backed E2E (`cargo xtask e2e`) for DnD regression coverage
Counterpart review must happen in-browser (React Aria first, then Ark UI, then Radix) before writing a plan; skipping it produces examples that technically work but fail visual/UX parity
When moving demos from local behavior to component callbacks (`on_dnd_event`), scan all six widget example files and both fixture files in parallel to avoid leaving the bug in 3 of 6 variants

Separating a docs-only PR from a large implementation branch requires `git restore --staged .` followed by targeted `git add <paths>` on a clean new branch; otherwise staged code leaks into the docs commit

friction: Sandbox blocked local server binding repeatedly; E2E and wasm tests required elevated network permissions on every run
In-app browser automation does not support native DragEvent construction, making visual DnD verification impossible through that surface
Dioxus hot-reload overlay persisted in the in-app browser tab even after clean server restarts, making visual verification unreliable
Long git commit hooks (90+ seconds with no output) caused the commit session to appear hung; the commit completed but the shell session did not return
Synthetic E2E drag events became stale after Dioxus/Leptos rerendered the grid on `dragstart`; required splitting into two WebDriver `execute_script` calls with a frame wait
Adapter test naming convention (`test_<component>.rs`) was only discovered when `cargo xtask lint adapter-parity` showed `SKIP` after correct implementation
Leptos `view!` macro rejects turbofish expressions inside prop values; requires extracting complex expressions to local bindings before passing to the macro
Dioxus preview/reflow timing caused E2E grid drop assertions to fail even after correct event handling; required adding diagnostic dumps to isolate whether events reached handlers
open_items: Checkbox adapter components (Leptos + Dioxus) are planned for a separate session; once implemented, GridList selection indicator should be revisited for visual consistency using Checkbox anatomy conventions

GridList still lacks: keyboard-driven DnD, screen-reader DnD announcements, external file drops, cross-collection moves, GridListSection/Header as first-class adapter components, `keyboardNavigationBehavior`, `disabledBehavior`, `shouldSelectOnPressUp` full wiring, and real IntersectionObserver load-more

The full GridList implementation (tasks #398/#490 branch `codex/issues-398-490-gridlist-adapters`) is uncommitted and has not been pushed; still awaiting `cargo xci-fast`, user approval, and Codex review
Docs PR #721 review fixes were committed but not yet pushed to update the open PR
Utility E2E fixture (`utility/showcase.rs`) still combines multiple components in one file; should be split per component as individual primitives are formalized

Six widget example files now carry the full Tailwind showcase copied with inline styles for drag previews; a shared demo utility/helper library across widget variants would reduce future maintenance cost
